	IncrementOutputOffset 08 00 00 00 
	Call 24 43 00 00 // ProcessType[[2][2]*runtime.traceBuf]
	Call 68 42 00 00 // ProcessType[*runtime.m]
	Return 
// 0x482c: ProcessType[runtime.plainError]
	ProcessString 2c 01 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x4832: ProcessType[strconv.NumError]
	Call 4c 48 00 00 // ProcessType[string]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 4c 48 00 00 // ProcessType[string]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 44 44 00 00 // ProcessType[error]
	Return 
// 0x484c: ProcessType[string]
	ProcessString b3 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x4852: ProcessType[table<bool,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 52 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<bool,int>]
	Return 
// 0x485d: ProcessType[table<int,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 5e 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,int>]
	Return 
// 0x4868: ProcessType[table<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 6a 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x4873: ProcessType[table<int,string>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 76 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,string>]
	Return 
// 0x487e: ProcessType[table<string,*main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 82 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,*main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x4889: ProcessType[table<string,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 8e 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,int>]
	Return 
// 0x4894: ProcessType[table<string,main.bigStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 9a 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.bigStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x489f: ProcessType[table<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call a6 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x48aa: ProcessType[table<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call b2 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x48b5: ProcessType[table<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call be 44 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x48c0: ProcessType[time.fileSizeError]
	ProcessString 1f 01 00 00 
	Return
